promptOptimizer.vagueWordDetected: Vague word "{{word}}" detected. Consider being more specific.

promptOptimizer.shortPromptWarning: Prompt is quite short. Adding more detail typically improves results.
promptOptimizer.longPromptStructureWarning: Long prompt without clear structure. Add headings, numbered steps, or sections.
promptOptimizer.examplesSuggestion: Consider adding examples to clarify the expected output.
promptOptimizer.ambiguousPronounStarts: Starts with ambiguous pronoun "{{pronoun}}". Specify the subject explicitly.
promptOptimizer.complexTaskSuggestion: Complex task detected. Consider adding "Think step by step" for better reasoning.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Organize how Tengra looks, behaves, and works.
settings.generalDescription: Choose the defaults Tengra falls back to when a workspace or conversation does not override them.
settings.workspaceDescription: Set the language, workspace root, and terminal runtime used across the app.
settings.editorDescription: Control inline suggestions, provider routing, and how coding answers should be written by default.
settings.appearanceDescription: Adjust the visual system, font stack, and text density used across the application.
settings.systemDescription: Decide how Tengra starts, updates itself, and behaves while running in the background.
settings.assistantDefaultsDescription: These defaults shape the assistant voice in the editor and settings-driven flows.
settings.answerDefaultsDescription: Set the default answer depth, tone, and structure for general conversations.
settings.modelVisibilityDescription: Keep frequently used models close and hide the ones you never want to see.
settings.favoriteModelsDescription: Comma-separated model IDs pinned to the top of selectors.
settings.hiddenModelsDescription: Comma-separated model IDs removed from pickers.
settings.contextMessageLimitDescription: Maximum number of recent messages included as conversation context.
settings.workspacesBasePathDescription: Default folder where new workspaces should be created.
settings.customInstructionsDescription: Persistent guidance that should always be considered when Tengra answers.
settings.themeDescription: Pick a base surface system for the whole app.
settings.fontFamilyDescription: Controls the default sans-serif and display fonts used across the interface.
settings.typographyScaleDescription: Adjust spacing and reading rhythm without changing the design layout.
settings.baseFontSizeDescription: Main UI text size used throughout the application.
settings.livePreviewDescription: See the current theme and typography choices together before moving on.
settings.previewBody: The new type system reduces visual noise, improves hierarchy, and makes setting groups easier to understand at a glance.
settings.voiceInterfaceEnabledDescription: Let Tengra react to voice commands and wake-word driven input.
settings.voiceContinuousListeningDescription: Keep listening after a command so hands-free control stays active.
settings.voiceAudioFeedbackDescription: Play spoken feedback after recognized actions when voice control is enabled.
settings.voiceVisualFeedbackDescription: Show visible confirmation when Tengra hears or executes a voice command.
settings.agentPathPolicyDescription: When enabled, agents can reach paths outside the workspace root.

socialMedia.headerDescription: Connect Tengra to your social media accounts for remote interaction and notifications.

security.title: Security Recommendation
security.description: Always use the whitelist (Allowed User IDs) to prevent unauthorized access to your system. Tengra will ignore commands from any ID not listed here. You can find your ID by messaging @userinfobot on Telegram or enabling Developer Mode on Discord.

importThemeValidation.invalidJsonObject: Invalid theme file: must be a JSON object
importThemeValidation.surfaceOpacityRange: surfaceOpacity must be a number between 0.6 and 1
importThemeValidation.surfaceBlurRange: surfaceBlur must be a number between 0 and 24
importThemeValidation.cursorStyleAllowedValues: cursorStyle must be one of: block, underline, bar
importThemeValidation.fontSizeRange: fontSize must be a number between 8 and 32
importThemeValidation.lineHeightRange: lineHeight must be a number between 1 and 2
importThemeValidation.customThemeObjectOrNull: customTheme must be an object or null
importThemeValidation.customThemeColorString: customTheme color values must be strings

tips.title: Did you know?
tips.tip1: Create a new chat with the Ctrl+N shortcut.
tips.tip2: Tengra supports connecting to remote SSH servers for development.
tips.tip3: You can drag and drop files directly into the chat.
tips.tip4: Use the "Council" tab to get multi-agent perspectives on your code.
tips.tip5: Customize your experience in Settings > Appearance.

runbookRollbackHints.setup: Delete generated dependencies and lock updates if setup introduced regressions.
runbookRollbackHints.build: Revert build config or generated artifacts to the last known good commit.

securityFindings.envFilesDetected: Environment files detected. Make sure sensitive keys are excluded from version control.
securityFindings.lockFileMissing: Dependency lock file is missing; dependency supply chain risk is higher.
securityFindings.evaluationUnavailable: Security posture could not be fully evaluated.

runbookTimelineMessages.invalidPathOrCommand: Invalid workspace path or runbook command.

missingPath.fixAction: Update workspace settings and set a valid root path before opening.

pathNotFound.fixAction: Reconnect the drive or update the workspace path in workspace settings.

multiRootLabelMissing.message: One or more mounts are missing labels.
multiRootLabelMissing.fixAction: Set a distinct name for each mount to keep multi-root explorer labels clear.

unavailable.fixAction: Install or enable a terminal backend (PowerShell, Command Prompt, or another supported shell).

indexingDisabled.fixAction: Enable indexing in workspace settings for workspace intelligence and navigation.

repositoryMissing.message: This folder is not a Git repository.
repositoryMissing.fixAction: Run "git init" or clone the repository before opening workspace workflows.

mainDirty.message: Policy warning: working tree is dirty on protected branch {{branch}}.
mainDirty.fixAction: Commit to a feature branch, then merge after review.

nodeMissing.message: Node.js is required for this workspace.
nodeMissing.fixAction: Install Node.js and ensure "node --version" works in your terminal.

npmMissing.message: npm is required for this workspace.
npmMissing.fixAction: Install npm (usually with Node.js) and ensure "npm --version" works.

pythonMissing.message: Python is required for this workspace.
pythonMissing.fixAction: Install Python and ensure "python --version" works in your terminal.

goMissing.message: Go is required for this workspace.
goMissing.fixAction: Install Go and ensure "go version" works in your terminal.

nodeUnpinned.message: Node runtime is not pinned for this workspace.
nodeUnpinned.fixAction: Add .nvmrc or .tool-versions to lock the Node version per workspace.

pythonUnpinned.message: Python runtime is not pinned for this workspace.
pythonUnpinned.fixAction: Add .python-version or .tool-versions to avoid environment drift.
